summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five unrelated open PRs. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No merge action is recommended because every PR is missing a complete merge preflight with current Codex /review proof; #91089 also has failing checks and broader automation scope.

actions.reason: Independent low-risk docs PR, but merge is blocked in plan output until the applicator has a complete merge preflight including current Codex /review proof.
Independent provider compatibility fix with useful contributor code; keep it in maintainer review rather than merge without current review preflight.
Standalone broad feature PR. Keep independent; do not merge or repair from this cluster without maintainer review and a complete merge preflight.
Independent focused bug fix with useful contributor code; merge is blocked until the failing boundary check is understood or repaired and complete merge preflight exists.
Broad automation PR with failing checks and release-process implications; maintainer judgment is needed before deciding whether to repair contributor branch, split scope, or decline.

needs_human: #91089 requires maintainer decision because it is broad release automation with multiple failing checks and release-process scope.
